text: In some (Ankley et al. 2002; Ankley et al. 2003; Lalone et al. 2013), but not all (Ankley et al. 2005; Sun et al. 2007; Skolness et al. 2013) fish reproduction studies, reductions in plasma vitellogenin have been associated with visible decreases in yolk protein content in oocytes and overall reductions in ovarian stage.
